_comment_kinds: Allowed kind values: skill, agent, cargo-test, script, manual, doc-section.
_comment_script: kind:script 'command' must contain exactly ONE scripts/* path token.
_comment_manual: kind:manual entries MUST include a non-empty 'steps' array.

AC-001-a.notes: Post-fix audit; R-004-desktop-width count == 0 on captions.

steps: Confirm preview shows arrow-boundary + center-line designer (not the creator image)
Toggle horizontal <-> vertical radio; preview redraws correctly

AC-001-c.notes: Desktop-width rule exercised at 1280x800 and 390x844; both return 0 for R-004-desktop-width.

AC-001-d.notes: Reviewer confirms no duplicated caption-sizing constants between src/ and src-tauri/.

AC-002-b.notes: Every export row exposes setting-role=label and setting-role=control per rule R-003.

AC-003-b.notes: Reviewer confirms every settings page uses the pageLayout outer classes; no per-page padding overrides.

steps: Open any slider setting (e.g. Advanced -> Performance)
Drag slider; observe numeric input mirrors value
Double-click numeric input, type a new value; observe slider moves

AC-005-b.notes: Auditor reads the PR diff; flags any new red-on-dark or light-grey-on-white token combinations as Critical.

AC-006-a.notes: Every new description key exists in all locale files; no hardcoded strings.

AC-006-b.notes: If any R-005-missing-description row remains, audit-report-after/descoped.md lists it with selector, reason, and follow-up bundle slug.

AC-006-c.notes: Parity across all 20+ locale files; exit 0.

AC-007-b.notes: R-004-desktop-width, R-003-export-two-column, R-003-layout, R-005-range-editable, R-005-color-light-grey-on-white all == 0 in audit-report-after/audit.json.

AC-007-c.notes: R-005-missing-description strictly less than baseline 130 OR ==0; remainder fully covered by descoped.md.

AC-008-a.notes: i18n parity green. (Lint/build also run during sufx-static-gates; tracked informally.)

steps: Navigate to Advanced -> Captions; confirm preview sizing and orientation toggle
Drag and type into at least one slider on Advanced -> Performance
Verify no overflow onto neighboring settings at default window size
